The view of the city is terrific. It gives you a good birds' eye view of San Francisco and surrounding landmarks.

A little surprised upper viewing deck had no roof. I went on a day with nice weather. Nice views of surroundings. Not a lot of parking but people don't normally stay long, so MIGHT be able to wait for parking.

One of the best views of the whole city. You can see the Golden Gate on one side and the bay bridge on the other. The day we went the elevator was not working so we walked up about 279 steps. The price of the visit is $10 and the place also has public toilets and a shop to carry a souvenir.
